/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/debug/debug_overlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/game/combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/game/replay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/game/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DeterministicCombatEngine.dir/src/render/renderer.cpp.o -o DeterministicCombatEngine   -L/home/saketh/dev/engine/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/saketh/dev/engine/lib -lraylib -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
